Bash(cd "C:\\GitHub\\French PGO Auctions Dashboard\\src\\backend" && ../../.venv/Scripts/python - << 'EOF'
import zipfile, openpyxl, io

# Inspect the 2024-2025 ZIP
with zipfile.ZipFile\("data/downloads/20251119_GO_2024_2025_GLOBAL_Results.zip"\) as zf:
    xlsx_files = [n for n in zf.namelist\(\) if n.endswith\(".xlsx"\)]
    print\(f"Files in ZIP: {len\(xlsx_files\)}"\)
    # Pick the first one that is NOT _EMPTY_
    target = next\(\(n for n in xlsx_files if "_EMPTY_" not in n\), xlsx_files[0]\)
    print\(f"Inspecting: {target}"\)
    with zf.open\(target\) as f:
        wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(f.read\(\)\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
        print\(f"Sheets: {wb.sheetnames}"\)
        for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
            ws = wb[sheet_name]
            print\(f"\\n--- Sheet: {sheet_name!r} ---"\)
            for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=5, values_only=True\), 1\):
                print\(f"  Row {i}: {[str\(c\)[:40] if c else None for c in row[:10]]}"\)
            if i >= 5:
                break
EOF
2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\GitHub\\French PGO Auctions Dashboard\\src\\backend" && ../../.venv/Scripts/python - << 'EOF'
import zipfile, openpyxl, io

# Inspect both ZIPs
for zip_path, label in [
    \("data/downloads/20251119_GO_2024_2025_GLOBAL_Results.zip", "2024-2025"\),
    \("data/downloads/GO_2019-2023_Global_Results.zip", "2019-2023"\),
]:
    with zipfile.ZipFile\(zip_path\) as zf:
        xlsx_files = sorted\([n for n in zf.namelist\(\) if n.endswith\(".xlsx"\)]\)
        # Pick files that are NOT _EMPTY_ sheets
        non_empty = [n for n in xlsx_files if "_EMPTY_" not in n]
        targets = non_empty[:2] if non_empty else xlsx_files[:2]
        print\(f"\\n=== {label} ==="\)
        for target in targets:
            print\(f"\\nFile: {target}"\)
            with zf.open\(target\) as f:
                wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(f.read\(\)\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
                for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames[:2]:
                    ws = wb[sheet_name]
                    print\(f"  Sheet: {sheet_name!r}"\)
                    for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=10, values_only=True\), 1\):
                        non_null = [c for c in row if c is not None]
                        if non_null:
                            print\(f"    Row {i}: {[str\(c\)[:50] for c in row[:8]]}"\)
EOF
2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\GitHub\\French PGO Auctions Dashboard\\src\\backend" && ../../.venv/Scripts/python - << 'EOF'
import zipfile, openpyxl, io, re

with zipfile.ZipFile\("data/downloads/20251119_GO_2024_2025_GLOBAL_Results.zip"\) as zf:
    xlsx_files = sorted\([n for n in zf.namelist\(\) if n.endswith\(".xlsx"\)]\)
    target = xlsx_files[0]
    print\(f"File: {target}"\)
    with zf.open\(target\) as f:
        wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(f.read\(\)\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
        ws = wb.active
        print\(f"Sheet: {ws.title}"\)
        rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=30, values_only=True\)\)
        for i, row in enumerate\(rows, 1\):
            non_null = [c for c in row if c is not None]
            if non_null:
                print\(f"  Row {i}: {[str\(c\)[:50] for c in row[:8]]}"\)

# Also check filename parsing
fname = "20240417_January_2024_63_GLOBAL_Results_detailedresults.xlsx"
m = re.match\(r"\(\\d{8}\)_\(\\w+\)_\(\\d{4}\)_\(\\d+\)_GLOBAL", fname\)
if m:
    date_str, month_name, year, num = m.groups\(\)
    print\(f"\\nParsed: date={date_str}, month={month_name}, year={year}, num={num}"\)
EOF
2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/GitHub/French PGO Auctions Dashboard/src/backend" && python -c "
import io, sys
from zipfile import ZipFile
import openpyxl

# Test the actual _parse_worksheet logic on a 2024-2025 file
from app.services.parser import _detect_header_row, _parse_excel_bytes, _COLUMN_MAP

with ZipFile\('data/downloads/20251119_GO_2024_2025_GLOBAL_Results.zip'\) as zf:
    fname = '20240619_March_2024_65_GLOBAL_Results_detailedresults.xlsx'
    data = zf.read\(fname\)

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(data\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
ws = wb[wb.sheetnames[0]]
print\('Sheet:', wb.sheetnames[0]\)

# Check header detection
hrow = _detect_header_row\(ws\)
print\('Detected header row:', hrow\)

# Re-open for col_map \(read_only exhausts iterator\)
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(data\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
ws2 = wb2[wb2.sheetnames[0]]
header_cells = list\(ws2.iter_rows\(min_row=hrow, max_row=hrow, values_only=True\)\)[0]
print\('Header cells:', [str\(c\)[:40] if c is not None else None for c in header_cells]\)
col_map = {}
for i, cell in enumerate\(header_cells\):
    if cell is not None:
        key = str\(cell\).strip\(\).lower\(\)
        canonical = _COLUMN_MAP.get\(key\)
        print\(f'  col {i}: {repr\(key[:40]\)} -> {canonical}'\)
        if canonical:
            col_map[i] = canonical
print\('col_map:', col_map\)

# Try full parse
records = _parse_excel_bytes\(data, fname\)
print\('Records parsed:', len\(records\)\)
if records:
    print\('First record:', records[0]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/GitHub/French PGO Auctions Dashboard/src/backend" && python -c "
import io
from zipfile import ZipFile
import openpyxl
from app.services.parser import _COLUMN_MAP

with ZipFile\('data/downloads/20251119_GO_2024_2025_GLOBAL_Results.zip'\) as zf:
    data = zf.read\('20240619_March_2024_65_GLOBAL_Results_detailedresults.xlsx'\)

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(io.BytesIO\(data\), read_only=True, data_only=True\)
ws = wb[wb.sheetnames[0]]
headers = list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=5, max_row=5, values_only=True\)\)[0]

for i, h in enumerate\(headers[:5]\):
    if h is not None:
        key = str\(h\).strip\(\).lower\(\)
        print\(f'col {i}: {repr\(key\)}'\)
        print\(f'  ords: {[ord\(c\) for c in key[:20]]}'\)
        print\(f'  in map: {key in _COLUMN_MAP}'\)

# Check the dict keys for region
print\(\)
print\('Map keys for region:'\)
for k, v in _COLUMN_MAP.items\(\):
    if v == 'region':
        print\(f'  key={repr\(k\)}, ords={[ord\(c\) for c in k]}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('pgo_auctions.db'\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM auction'\)
print\('Total rows:', c.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM auction WHERE technology IS NULL'\)
print\('Rows technology=NULL:', c.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
c.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM auction WHERE technology IS NOT NULL'\)
print\('Rows technology IS NOT NULL:', c.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
c.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT region FROM auction LIMIT 10'\)
print\('Sample regions:', [r[0] for r in c.fetchall\(\)]\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/GitHub/French PGO Auctions Dashboard/src/backend" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('pgo_auctions.db'\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)
c.execute\('SELECT id, region FROM auction WHERE id=4338'\)
row = c.fetchone\(\)
if row:
    print\('id:', row[0]\)
    print\('region repr:', repr\(row[1]\)\)
    print\('region ords:', [ord\(ch\) for ch in row[1]]\)
else:
    print\('row not found'\)
    c.execute\('SELECT id, region FROM auction ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3'\)
    for r in c.fetchall\(\):
        print\(' id:', r[0], 'region:', repr\(r[1]\), 'ords:', [ord\(ch\) for ch in r[1]]\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

# Find 'Rh' in the bytes
idx = raw.find\(b'Rh'\)

    snippet = raw[idx:idx+10]
    print\('bytes around Rh:', list\(snippet\)\)
    print\('hex:', snippet.hex\(\)\)
